original_image_tags: A sparse, hand-drawn diagram on a cream-colored, aged paper page. The paper has two punched holes at the top edge. At the top left, an arrow points right with the typed label "

elements.description: A hand-drawn sketch featuring the typed text 'Facing South' in the top left corner and the typed label 'EAST' near the top right vertical axis. There are two vertical annotations in the center area that appear to read 'RED FLAME'. The sketch depicts minimal, faint lines, with prominent marks near the edges of the page.

judge.reason: Description A describes an arrow and typed label while Description B describes a sketch with typed labels 'Facing South' and 'EAST', indicating they are describing different visual content entirely.
